spec.name: A Trail Through The Dense Forest
spec.description: You are on a trail winding east and west through the dense forest. To the east, the forest gradually seems to become lighter.

east.description: The trail continues eastwards to the younger part of the forest.

west.description: You see the narrow trail winding westwards through the dense forest.

extra_descs.description: The forest trail seems almost fragile compared to the massive trunks.
The dense crowns of the mature trees leave only a fraction of the sky to be seen through the leaves.
